message:
feat(e2e): add geodesic normalization E2E harness (bd-1i1w)

End-to-end test proving geodesic normalization works in practice:
- 7 scenarios: simple, interleaved, convergence, baseline, contention,
  cancel-drain, and obligation-interleave
- Deterministic JSON report with golden checksum regression gate
- Validates: byte-identical reports across runs, switch cost improvement,
  valid linear extensions, geodesic <= Foata bound, no oracle violations
- Cancel-drain scenario: injects mid-flight cancellation on 2 of 4 tasks
- Obligation-interleave: creates/commits/aborts obligations across tasks

Also includes clippy fix for early mutex guard drops in plan::fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
